message:
🐛 Fix pause/resume JSON leaking into terminal + add flow throttle (#191)

Two fixes for pause/resume flow control messages appearing as text in
the Claude Code CLI prompt:

1. Server: guard against concatenated JSON control messages. When rapid
   pause/resume messages get coalesced into a single WebSocket frame,
   JSON.parse fails and the string falls through to PTY write. Now the
   catch block checks for known control message patterns and discards
   them instead of writing to the PTY.

2. Frontend: throttle pause/resume transitions to 100ms minimum gap.
   Prevents rapid watermark oscillation at the HIGH/LOW boundary from
   generating thousands of flow control messages per second.

Also includes uncommitted server-side PTY output batching (coalesces
~4000 PTY events/s into ~60 WebSocket messages/s at 16ms intervals).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
